english: What is the significance of the Net Neutrality guidelines issued by the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI) in 2016?
hindi: टेलीकॉम रेगुलेटरी अथॉरिटी ऑफ इंडिया (ट्राई) ने 2016 में नेट न्यूट्रलिटी के दिशानिर्देश जारी किए, इसका क्या महत्व है?
tamil: டிஆர்ஏஐ என்பது 2016 இல் நெட் நியூட்ரலிட்டி வழிகாட்டுதல்களை வெளியிட்டது, அதன் பொருள் என்ன?
vietnamese: Nhiệp vụ Net Neutrality do Ủy ban quản lý và điều tiết (TRAI) của Ấn Độ ban hành vào năm 2016 có ý nghĩa gì?
correct_answer: The guidelines aimed to ensure that all internet service providers in India treat all online content equally, without any discrimination or throttling. This was a significant move to promote net neutrality in the country.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that the TRAI guidelines were issued in 2020, or by providing a vague answer that does not accurately capture the significance of the guidelines.
bengali: ভারতের টেলিকমিউনিকেশন নিয়ন্ত্রণ কমিশন কর্তৃক ২০১৬ সালে জারি করা নেট নিউট্রালিটি নিয়মাবলীর গুরুত্ব কী?
